Plus Positive Marketing Group is a marketing consultancy serving clients from Fortune100 companies like IBM, Hyatt Hotels, AT&T, HP, Fleet Bank, Disney, Continental Airlines, Mass Port Authority, Bridgestone/Firestone to hundreds more from small start-ups to mid-sized companies.
